task: Debug MidpointX Context Store Save Error
outcomes: Identified that the `MemoryManager.commitTheorem` method was silently catching and returning `false` on database fetch failures, masking the true root cause.
Debugged Firebase permission error revealing that Cloud Firestore API had not been enabled.
Enabled Firestore API and created the default Firestore Native database using gcloud.
patterns_observed: When wrapping third-party SDK calls (like Firebase) in a try-catch returning boolean, underlying infrastructure errors (like missing APIs or missing default databases) get swallowed, producing generic application state errors.
errors_encountered: Firebase Error 5 NOT_FOUND and 7 PERMISSION_DENIED originally presented as a generic `Could not persist validated theorem` from the ModifyActor.
corrections_made: Enabled Cloud Firestore API on `MidpointX-v2` and initialized the default Native Firestore database in `us-west1` via gcloud.
